days.message:
Hi. I don't expect you to ever read these again, but I'm just using it as my daily journal about my feelings now. Read or don't read, it's up to you.

I'm in shambles. I can't think really. I tried to run to clear my mind and maybe think more level-headed but it didn't do anything for me. If anything, I feel like throwing up nonstop now. Maybe I ate something funny, or maybe it's because I carry my emotions in my gut. Anyways, I feel like shit. But maybe I'm like 5% less likely to kill myself now, so it's probably working.

Right after I talked to you, I called Pooja. I decided to rely on my girlfriend for my emotions for pretty much the first time. It had always been you. But without you in the picture, I had to find someone else, so I decided to call her. I was in tears from the beginning, and I just kept saying "I'm a terrible boyfriend. You deserve someone better. I'm sorry for hurting you." She tried to console me saying that I am not terrible and she knows that I can treat her better, and that I am a great person at heart. I felt sick when she said that. Deepthi, I'm a terrible person, I don't deserve someone as caring as her. But, I accepted her kindness, and told her what was hurting me. I told her that I broke off my friendship with you, right before I called her. That keeping you in my life would just make me falter with her, and that I couldn't be both your friend and a good boyfriend to her. Everytime I see you, the feelings just come back a little and I can't risk it. For both myself and for you (Deepthi), I had to distance completely. I had to cut you out of my life. That's what I told her. She started crying instantly out of empathy. That she appreciates how much I care for her to end things with you. But also that I didn't need to do that, and that she feels terrible that I did it for her. I assured her that it wasn't because of her, and it was just my choice in the end. And that this seems to be the best move forward. We then cried and cried some more. I told her that, I'm gonna be sad for a while, and I'll still be crying a month from now, and she just quietly said okay. I told her it was like losing an Aman or Archit or Becca in my life. But she doesn't know that it's even more than that. That I'm saying bye to the person who I still see as my life partner. Honestly, I don't know what she thinks. She probably thinks I'm still in love with you with how emotional I got. She knows but she won't say it. But don't worry, Deepthi. I didn't tell her anything about you having feelings for me, because I know you want to keep that part of your life a secret. By the end of the call, I was still crying, and told her I'd do better and will try in our relationship. I was so emotional, I told her how I wanted to kill myself in the past multiple times. She kept telling me to never do that, and that she could never recover if I did. At this point, I don't even know what to feel. I'm so numb and don't want to be here anymore.

I then talked to Archit. I don't feel like going into details. But I told him everything, in even more detail. I didn't tell him any new developments like the June 15th deadline and all. But I told him my friendship with you might be over. At first, he seemed more worried about the friend group, and how it will be bad from now on. That annoyed me. But then we used that as a tangent to talk about you as a friend, and how I want him to treat you the same as always and be the friend to you that I want to be. I told him that I really want the whole friend group to go to Thailand still. I want you and Rish to go. Please Deepthi. I've already gone on trips with this friend group, I want you to experience it too. Afterwards, he just kept telling me that this is the right thing to do. How originally he thought we could just stay friends, but after all this back and forth constantly, maybe a clean break is needed. He also said that you aren't the right person for me because you don't want to be with me. Does she really care about you, Suraj? Is she really your soulmate like you say? Does her just having the same hobbies as you make her that special? Does she really understand you emotionally? I was so sad in that moment, but I couldn't let him belittle the feelings you had for me. I would defend you at every step to the point where he just had to concede that you were the one for me and it was just unlucky. He is allowed to say that you couldn't commit to me, but I will never accept anyone saying you don't love me, because I know that's not true. Archit eventually called what we had, beautiful. He said it's actually so amazing what we have for each other, and that he's really sorry it couldn't work out. Then he also told me not to kill myself, and that he would come up to SF to hang with me if needed. Legend.

I'm mostly just wondering how you are doing. Did your talk with Rish go as expected? Are you just going to forget me and commit to him fully now? Did you tell him that you love me? It still hurts a lot that you refuse to tell him your true feelings, how you felt all this time. I just wish you would, Deepthi. And not leave me all alone. Speaking of leaving alone, I'm sorry for just leaving you today. I just had to. I told you that I don't want to talk to you anymore based on your conversation, and that is because it is too hard for me to talk to you. I emotionally can't handle another conversation of you saying you don't pick me. But the entire time I just thought I was a shitty person for requesting that. If I really cared for you, and loved you as much as I said I did, I would talk to you after, and discuss our/your future. I'm the only person you can talk to about some things. I don't want you to hole in your emotions like I do. So Deepthi, if you are reading this, you're allowed to call me if you need to talk. Or message me. I will put aside my emotions and talk to you about everything. I'll keep saying it because it is still true. I love you, Deepthi.
questions: Do you hate me for asking to distance permanently?
Do you know that I will never stop loving you?
How are you, Deepthi?

days.message:
Hmm. Today's emotions. I'm still sad. Brain is still numb. It could also be the fact that I'm also really tired. That run earlier did give me a serotonin boost, but at the same time I had this aching pain in my head. It was just pounding and pounding. Started when I was talking to you, and I felt like my ears were going to burst, and my eyes were gonna pop out of their sockets. It was not a pleasant feeling. Maybe your headache is just contagious through the phone or something, crazy sickness you have. By the time I got to the bottom of the Laguna hill which was 0.4 miles, my pace was a flat 7:00 so I guess this headache helped me ignore all the other pain in my body. During this run however, I felt like I was getting clarity like I always do. Suddenly everything felt fine, and I was hopeful for the future. I never told you this, but when I run, I always feel ambitious and want to Leetcode. It's a random feeling that starts around the time I reach the Panhandle, and goes away shortly after my run is done. If you ever feel like you are slacking on your interview prep, just run my route and you will feel encouraged. Stronger than an Archit pep talk imo. Also, thanks for being the first to give me kudos.

Part of the run, and hours after, I was thinking of you, and your health. With all of the crazy thoughts jumping around in my head, I still worry about you. For better or for worse, this atleast distracts me from wanting to kill myself. So I guess that's one way to keep me alive and around. I worry that the stress is causing you too much pain, and I know when you are really stressed it manifests physically for you. Please take care of yourself. I want to just message you everyday checking on you and making sure you are okay. I guess I won't really be getting any responses on here, but I'll be asking you how you are feeling everyday on here, and be praying for your recovery. I don't believe it is from some an actual sickness, but just from stress like you said. However, I did give you a list of things you can do to feel better, but I forgot to mention one remedy. It is minor, and maybe you already do it, but take ibuprofen as well as Tylenol, for your back. Tylenol is a great fever reducer, but for your back pain Advil/ibuprofen will work better. If you have Aleve, that works as well. Doctor Suraj recommendation is 1 Tylenol, 2 advil every 8 hours until you feel better. Don't worry about overconsumption of these drugs, it won't have any long term effects if it is just for a week or so. I just really want you to feel better, and it makes me really sad that I can't even do anything for you from here. Also massaging upper neck and shoulder can really relieve headaches, so make Rish do that for you. And tongue stretches are underrated, but they really really help reduce stress in your jaw muscles which are common causers of headaches. And hydration/electrolytes please. Ok I won't nag you to do everything, but hope you drink soup atleast if it's hard to swallow bigger things. Feel better, Deepthi.

In other news, I talked with Pooja today after my run. She really wants me to go therapy, not because of the current mental situation, but because she thinks I should have a third party to just bounce my feelings off of. I guess that's fair, maybe I'll do it. My sister has been telling me to do it for the past few years, but maybe it's finally time. If I'm still around in 2 weeks, maybe I'll consider it :) Anyways, after that she asked me if I thought you were feeling the same sadness as me. I thought about that for a while. Does Deepthi feel as sad as I do? She says she's sad, but I don't think she wants to end herself right? Right, Deepthi? I've been so caught up in my own feelings, I've barely asked you about yourself. You told me small snippets here and there, but we never dove into you. I'm sorry for being a bad friend, or whatever I am to you. I care about you. I'm just really messed up right now. So, after all these thoughts in my head, I told Pooja you feel the same way as me, because Deepthi and I feel the same. We are very similar people. I don't know how she felt about that answer, but it led to her asking me another question. Probably after an hour, she asked me what I would do if you broke up with Rish. How would I feel? I told her that I'm committed to her, and that the Deepthi saga is done in my life. Even if she's single, doesn't change the fact that I love her (Pooja), and want to be with her. But honestly, I don't know what I would do. If you just straight up broke up with Rish, without expecting me to be with you after? Would I feel hurt? Would I feel excited? Would I want to be with you? I think I would want to be with you, but my head started pounding again, and I couldn't think anymore.

My head is still in pain. I honestly don't know why. Deepthi, I just need the whole world to stop and let me out. Everything needs to stop spinning. I might see Kiyaan tomorrow, so let's hope I'm not dizzy when holding my big-eyed nephew. *Hug*

(Also I know I didn't say what I normally say at the end of every chapter. I still feel it deeply, but idk it feels wrong to type it right now. Just know, I'll always be feeling it for you, Deepthi)
questions: Are you actually listening to my advice to get better?
What will it take for me to feel happy again?
Did you think this was going to be about Pain from Naruto?
days.signature: Your head banging and head throbbing friend, Suraj

days.message: My chest hurts a lot today. It's just been beating so hard it feels like my ribcage is going to crack open. My head still hurts. I was hoping day 4 would be better, but I still feel the same. I keep imagining Rish surprising you at Penn Station and hugging you from the back. That's what I want to do. That's what I would do. I don't have much to say today. It just feels like I'm having a constant heart attack. I hope you are feeling better today and can experience the Knicks parade. Enjoy your life for me.

Today was a long day. My head still hurts. I decided to go on a trail run today hoping that a run in nature helps cure my depression. My first time ever really doing one, and I guess it did distract me, but that was only because the elevation was killing me and my mind was just too tired to think. After that, I honestly felt kind of okay for like thirty minutes on the drive home, but once I got home I started feeling really sad again. I just get really depressed when I'm alone. But Aman invited me out to watch the game with Riya and Shreya. I kind of didn't want to go since they remind me of you, but it had been a while since I had seen Shreya so I decided to show up. It was nice seeing Shreya, and I chatted with her here and there the entire time we hung out. I don't think I was a really fun person to be around. You came up a few times, and my chest would tighten everytime. Literally, them just saying how you aren't active in their group chat really, hurt me. We then talked about me and Pooja and how in a month it will be 1 year of us knowing each other. Time really flew by. And I told them how she wants to celebrate both our first date anniversary as well as our offical anniversary, and that prompted a discussion as to what people prefer. They talked about you and Rish, and how when you guys got together, you would celebrate it every single month. I wanted to cry in that moment but I held back. I guess I just wished it was me instead celebrating that with you, and I was just imagining the different gifts/activities we could do each month. How I have so many special memories with you, so I could pick and choose which gift to give each month. I just felt like shit the remaining hour and wanted to go home. When Aman dropped off Riya and Shreya, Riya just kept telling me that she heard some things, and was so cryptic. I wonder if you told both of them everything. She wouldn't tell me what she knew.

I decided to go to my uncle's place afterwards since family was there. Maybe having baby Kiyaan around me would make me happy. He was really cute. He smiled everytime he saw me and I would just carry him like Simba and whisk him through the living room like an airplane. Man was having a blast but my shoulders weren't strong enough so I would hand him off to Prithvi. They would just be like "Your uncle Suraj is going to annoy you so much growing up! He's going to take you on runs! He's going to feed you so much chintapandu!!" It made me smile. I want to be there for his future, and I want to see what he is like when he grows up. Will he become a runner? Will he become a ladies man? Will he be as weird as me? Wow, I am crying while typing this now. I want to see all this, but I still can't see myself lasting that long. I love Kiyaan so much, but I just hate myself so much that it doesn't matter. What is this now, day 5? I just need to end it all. Everything is just so sad and meaningless. Atleast Kiyaan doesn't really know me, so he won't miss me when I'm gone.

Archit and Aman keep asking me how I'm doing. I just tell them I'm feeling better every day, so they don't worry. Truth is, nothing has changed. Everything hurts the same. If day 2 felt like 95% kms, today might be 92%. I don't tell them how literally just seeing your Strava post somewhere in upstate NY with Rish, makes me sad and want to cry. I saw it right after I handed Kiyaan to Prithvi, and the small amount of joy I had from holding him was gone. I hope your trip is great, Deepthi. I might stop typing these messages. I don't want these feelings to impact your life. I'm impacting everyone's lives too much. I'll just tell everyone I'm back to normal now. Maybe if you were around me you would be able to tell I'm lying, but no one else knows me like you do. I just want to stop crying, but I can't stop. Bye.

Shit. My head hurts so much. It's like burning sensation in the back of my head now. My chest is still tight, and my heart beats so hard that I can feel it up to my throat and it makes it hard to breathe. I go to sleep every night hoping the pain resolves itself the following day, but it's just a wild dream at this point. I wish I could just gouge out my feelings, because I don't want them anymore. I don't want to feel anything anymore. I don't want to feel love again.

Bye.

Hi. It's time for the day 25 check in. Yeah it's still pretty shit. I remember telling you yesterday that it was the first day with no throbbing sensation in my head, but that was short-lived. The pain has annoyingly returned and is continuing its morning routine on my body. I just wake up and feel like I have a ravaging hangover every morning (well I assume it's a hangover, I don't get them), and proceed to take my morning advil/tylenol hoping the pain reduces. Honestly, the fact that it has been going on this long makes me wonder if the Minoxidil is the one causing it, but that's just me coping at this point. We all know this is from the emotional distress that I'm in every moment of my life. The feeling of not knowing where my life is headed and how I want to live my life. Those 4 questions I told you... they are always in my mind. After I talked to you last night, I messaged Pooja if we can talk. I told her I was feeling especially sad today, and I wanted to talk to her. I guess I'm trying to lean on her, and see if she could provide me with what I need emotionally. I highly doubt she could reach Deepthi status, but at this point I'll just be happy with 70% of what you provide me. Maybe you just set the bar too high for me, and I should never expect that, and be satisfied with what I have. If she just asks me questions and guides a conversation, that would be enough. She doesn't need to understand the full depth of my emotions, but as long as she can help me figure it out for myself, that's enough. But anyways, I talked with her, and she started by just talking about her day, and I was just thinking like "I literally told her I was sad and needed to talk, why is her chill work day the priority?" Regardless, I listened to her and asked her more questions about her day, even though she knew I had to go on a run with Thomas in 15 minutes. Then I told her that I don't know when I will have time to play NYT games and now would be the only time, so we spent another 10 minutes playing that. At least I popped off, so it was pretty efficient. But, it kind of hurt because it felt like my feelings were just an afterthought, it's never a priority. Maybe she is just tired of my sadness, and because of that we don't talk about it much anymore. Idk. Should I be asking her explicitly, even though I said this was the purpose of the call? Maybe I should, if I think it's important. And then finally, with 3 minutes left, she asked me how my heart was doing. What can I even cover in 3 minutes. I told her that I felt really sad because we are having a game night today, and it's not the same without you. And how I miss how it was a year or so ago, or even last time you visited. How can I enjoy nights like these, knowing I may never have a night like this with my best friend again? It's just not the same. She at least validated my feelings, saying it sucks that things won't be the same, but then added that friend groups always change and people will be busy from time to time, so it makes sense that people won't always be there. Like Kenny won't be free sometimes, or Aman, or Archit, and new people may join, but I should still have fun when it does happen. I don't think she understands your impact in my life. And how it's not as simple as someone not showing up, it's the fact that a person you are close to may NEVER show up again, and how their presence really elevates your excitement/fun. I hated how she just brushed it off, but I couldn't even get into anything, because I had to go. I just thanked her for talking to me, she told me to be happier, told me I need therapy again, and I left for my run.

My run with Thomas was not great. Well based on my heart rate sheeeeeesh, but the actual duration of the run was pretty tragic. I honestly wanted to run on my own after our call. Even though my Sunday run felt terrible and didn't clear my mind at all, running on my own does help me most of the time. But, I had already promised Thomas and he planned around running with me, so I couldn't just cancel on him saying I want to run on my own. So, we departed on our run, and we talked about his Anthropic interview and half marathon training until the Panhandle water fountain, and then after that I asked him about his Hawaii trip. I have been so out of it, that I forgot to even ask Kasey and Thomas about their trip. I'm such a shitty friend. We then talked about all the fun activities he did, and the beaches they visited, along with all the seafood they tried. I was trying so hard to be present in this convo, but my mind kept drifting after every sentence he told me. I was just fantasizing what a trip to Hawaii would be like with you. How much poke would we go try? Would we hold hands and walk along the beach? Would she get upset if I make her pose at every beach we go to for pictures? What would seeing the manta rays with her be like? Would she wear the brown bikini she wore to the bathhouse? Then I was literally just imagining sitting next to you on the beach, with your hair being re-arranged so beautifully by the ocean breeze, knees tucked into your chest, your head laying on them, and you facing me smiling so radiantly. With so much love. I just imagined that for the rest of the run. It pains me that I can never go on a trip with you like that. Not even an impromptu weekend getaway. All the fun things Thomas did, I just want to do it all with you. Wow, typing that makes me cry. Only 11:30 AM, and I got my second set of tears of the day. By the time, we got back to the Panhandle on our loop, I was no longer asking him questions, I just wanted to be alone. I'm honestly surprised Thomas didn't ask me a single question about myself the entire run. Maybe there's nothing he wants to know about me. But also this is probably why I don't feel comfortable opening up to him about my feelings anymore, because it just doesn't seem like he would care really. 

Then came board games. It was fun, we played BotC twice. I still want to play it with you. If we ever play it together one day, could I sit next to you? I want to meta game, and smell your scent to know if you are good or bad :) Before we played, Kasey showed everyone the birthday vlog because they weren't all at my bday. Kasey literally went to her room, and edited out the parts where you were mentioning Riya because Kenny was there. That was really nice of her, and I didn't realize she did that until the end of the video. When we were watching it, I felt really sad seeing you. I wanted to cry. I just joked the entire video with everyone to distract me from my sadness. Didn't help that Kenny would comment about you every couple minutes. Like bro, why you so obsessed with my girl? Kidding. Seeing you wearing my green shirt, my hoodie, holding my flowers :( It made me really miss you, Deepthi. Every scene, I would just be looking for you, and see what you were doing. Maybe I can't say this anymore, but I liked how your butt looked in the leggings. I love how all of you looks. Honestly, looking back at it (the night, not your butt), it honestly brings me happiness that you were include in this game night at least in video form. Another game night with Deepthi :)

I know you mentioned how you don't get aroused by anything anymore, but when you went upstate, you could still imagine what it would be like with me there. Is it bad that I still imagine it too? Thoughts like that pop into my head, at random times throughout the day, and I would think,"Is it right for me to miss this girl both emotionally and physically?" I was thinking about this a lot over the past week actually. How can I cry over her and say I'm so emotionally exhausted and then say I want to have sex with you? Why do I always imagine ramming into your butt on every surface in my household, while I choke you? Why can I still feel it so deeply, and why is it the only thing that arouses me? In New York, in Lafayette, in Concord, in SF. Literally, in my mind I'm imagining new things I could do with you on the daily as if that is ever going to happen. I think it just shows me how much I bonded with you in every facet of our relationship. I would be lying if I said this wasn't also a factor in me wanting to be with you. Physical is also very important to me, not sex particularly, but the human touch, and with you it felt perfect and I crave for it. I tell Pooja that sex isn't important to me, and when I tell her I can 100% tell you that I am being truthful. I don't feel the need to have sex with her, holding her is just enough for me. Even though she wants to, and asks me to everytime, I don't want to. Why can't I just sleep instead, that's more productive. But why, when I imagine you next to me, I want to have sex with you? Maybe I'm just so physically and emotionally connected to you, that I want it to happen. I feel so in sync with you and your body, and you somehow always know what I want. It feels right when it's with you. If we did end up together, probably would have needed an IUD for sure.

I still love you, Deepthi. I won't kill myself (probably), but I still don't know if I can truly be my happiest with anyone but you. Life without you in my arms, feels like a waste. I know it may seem like if we were together, we would just build upon each other's sadness and would need someone else to take us out of it. I disagree. If someone is dependent on me, I can't stay sad, because they need me to be there for them. Pooja is pretty self sufficient, and I know how to navigate her pretty well now. Even while I'm sad, I know what I need to do for her, like ask about her day, talk about things she's struggling with, and make jokes so that she will smile and laugh. I would do the same for you, if not more. For you, I would know exactly what is making you sad and would be able to talk to you about it in depth. If you are crying and depressed, how would I be able to just accept that and wallow as well. It's not a joke when I say we tailor our feelings to oppose each other. If one person is sad, the other one becomes supportive, and vice versa. And the reason it's like that is also because of our similarity. We have the same tendencies, and for me it's actually a positive not a negative. When I say I wanted someone similar to me, it's not really so surface level, theres a strong emotional depth that comes with it. That's why I wanted it to be you. Also, I'm not saying this to try to get you to pick me or anything, it's just how I felt about what you said. Thanks for reading.
questions: Would you be upset if I told you I want to keep the necklace?
Am I terrible for being happy that you still only have sexual feelings for me?
Do you have any headache remedies? Please share.

days.message:
Hi. My head still hurts. I couldn't sleep last night, due to me just thinking about you doing Volo with Rish. Just another activity I would have loved to do with you, and have dreamt of multiple times. I guess you did ask me way back when, and I decided not to, so who am I to complain about missing this opportunity and be sad about it. I guess this is what that Volo Soccer group chat in your messages was about. I remember seeing it on your phone back in May when you showed me something. I thought it was just an old Volo chat being active, but I guess I'm just an idiot who likes to see what he wants to see. Hope you have fun, and win more games this time. When I used to imagine me playing with you, it always be me and you attacking a goal, with me providing you the most perfect through ball, and you scoring over the goalie who is diving to save the ball. It was very picturesque. We were the Dywane Wade and Lebron of soccer. Sorry, I don't know enough soccer players to make a good soccer analogy. Maybe Messi to Neymar when they played on Barcelona idk. But also in reality, we wouldn't even be that. As cool as it is to score a goal, my favorite position is actually defender. They are the unsung heroes of the game, the ones who aren't really remembered by name, but provide just as much to the game as any other player. I find so much joy in thwarting the opposing team's offense. Like you lowkey have to be acrobatic, to defend without your hands unlike a goalie. It's so rewarding when you actually make a full stop on the opposing offense. You should try out that role if you guys play that way. I know how flexible you are, so you can get a real long stretch in to block some of the balls. Just be careful about your legs please. I worry that your legs are going to be in more pain due to all the lateral movement involved as well, and I know you don't do strength training for those muscles.

I feel like there are some new thoughts I have about relationships and love, but I still want to sit on them before expressing them further. Honestly micro-managing my feelings and trying to figure everything out at the granular level is making me tired. I don't even want to think of my feelings or what I want today. I feel like you might be interested in my developing thoughts, but as you said, I can do whatever I want to do, so I just want to write about my day yesterday and what I'm looking forward to today. Yes, even Sadraj looks forward to events sometimes. Progress, right? Also, I'm currently listening to the Khalid album from 2025, and I am enjoying it a lot. Can you listen to it when you have free time? I think you would like it, Deepthi. I don't know if the whole I listen to whatever Suraj tells me to do thing is still active. I really like "whenever you're gone" currently.

So yesterday, I was home the whole day, and picked up Thomas at like 4PM from the Caltrain. Didn't really do much, another 1 hr workday for Suraj. Swaraj called me again, and asked me if everything is okay. Guess it's easy to tell now? I told him everything was going very well, and I will have some deliverables completed by tonight. I don't even know why I lied to him. I feel like he would have understood if I told him it has been an emotionally very rough couple of weeks for me. Maybe if I told him I was using AI to help me with my mental struggles, I would even get brownie points. But anyways, I don't want to talk about Swaraj. I went to see an actual World Cup game yesterday! Not just like at a bar, but we had seats in Levi's! It was in the 422 section so we were really high up, but you could see the whole field very clearly, and it was a memorable experience. I just wish one of the teams had scored, but it did get hype whenever someone got close to scoring. I loved hearing all the national chants from the Paraguay and Australian fans. Australia was kind of troll however. They just say OI OI OI. Sounded like a bunch of drunk people making noises like a seal, but loved to see the camaraderie. I took pictures and videos of the venue and the game (It was actually my first time in Levi's as well as first soccer game). I wish I took a picture of myself at the game, to encapsulate the memory. But, all I could imagine when taking pictures of, was how much I wanted you to be in them. Deepthi would look good at this angle. I want a picture with her at this sign. Oh my god there are face tattoos, I want to put it on Deepthi's face and take a picture next to the flag. Just imagining you smile there with me, makes me want to cry. Life just seems so much more fun with your presence and banter in events like this. Thomas doesn't even talk. He just sits there silently and I have to talk to him about the game constantly. I want to talk with you and hear your thoughts. Also, Thomas left me for 45 minutes to buy merch, so it was just me for the longest time sitting there. Why couldn't you be there and give me company, Deepthi? Sitting in bleachers, just reminds me of BTS now, and sitting next to you leg on leg with you wrapping around and pulling me closer. Everything reminds me of you. My heart is beating so fast right now. I don't want you to leave me. I tell you that I don't want to even be friends, but my heart just wants you every second. I don't know what to do.

Thomas is at my place now. I gave him Thokku, I think you guys call it Pachadi. He liked it, and my mom enjoys talking to him. It's interesting to have him here, but is it bad to be kind of offended that he asks my mom how she is doing, but has never asked me that in like years now. Maybe I'm just being unreasonable, and he is just making small talk, but why doesn't he ever ask me that? I ask him about himself. I'm just being extra, just ignore me. Anyways, my mom was going to the Indian store, and asked me if I needed anything for SF, and that's when I remembered that I needed the spices for the chicken curry we were going to make. I didn't have the ingredient list, so Thomas got the transcript of the video and asked Claude to generate the list, which is what you might have seen in the chat. He was like "I'll send it on messenger" and posted it in the chat... Bro made me reinstall the app and go in Wingman for this recipe. And to my surprise, you were in there too. Active and typing about Big Bang. Your name changed. Proud of your VO2, Deepthi. You are literally going to surpass me (I guess you already have by your metric). I liked how we both loved Thomas's message about the curry. Was that for me, or for the chicken curry? Knowing you it would be for the food. Also, I haven't logged out of your things yet Deepthi, sorry. I don't read them, but I also don't want to remove it. Thank you for still trusting me. Also idk why I keep checking my Insta to see if you messaged anything. We aren't messaging anymore, so why am I? Maybe I just hope that you send me something, anything.

I am looking forward to Khalid today. Prithvi, my sister, Aman, his sister, and my sister's friends. It should be a fun time. I will try my best to filter out all my other emotions and enjoy his performance. I say that but I know that I will be thinking of you when I hear his depressing ass music. Deepthi, I want to experience it all with you still. Just having you next to me, vibing and bobbing back and forth would bring me so much joy, but I know those days are long gone. I'll try to at least not cry. I miss you a lot, in every aspect of my life. You will always be in my heart, Deepthi.
questions: Could you please play league with everyone even if I'm not there?
Is having a headache this long a medical concern?
Should I tell Pooja that my feelings are actually much stronger than I had said earlier?

days.message: Cool cleats. I love you, Deepthi.

Hi. I think I might be getting sick. In addition to my headache that comes and goes by the hour, I now have a congested nose, nasal drip (I hate this the most), and general fatigue. My body is going to collapse, and I don't even have an appetite either. I literally went downstairs to help Becca take some storage boxes that Aman left, and the front office guy, Michael, was there as well. We chatted, and then he whispered to me and Becca, "Suraj, how are you doing?" I was thrown off by that question, and answered that everything was good. And then, he said it was obvious something has been bothering me the past two weeks, and I don't seem as happy as I always do. He says I lost a pep in my step. Then Becca chimed in and said that I actually look terrible. Thanks Becca lol. I just told Michael afterwards that I was just going through some stuff right now, so getting better day by day. Am I getting better day by day? It definitely is a process and some days are better than others, but I suppose if I had to compare from Day 1/2, I am technically better. But anyways, I'm just surprised he noticed that about me. Even Thomas and Kasey haven't noticed a thing about me being sad. I'm guessing it's also because they have never lived with me before, so they might just think I'm always like this at home?? And we already know Thomas doesn't care about my feelings, but then again does he ask anyone how they are doing (except my parents)?

Actually the morning of the surprise party, Thomas and I went on our half marathon run. It was supposed to be a 10 mile run and I said we could just run across the bridge and come back to get to that number. But, when we reached the end of the bridge, we realized that we would be like 1 mile short if we ran back right now since we wanted to end at Sports Basement (Thomas wanted to buy a Mexico jersey), so we did that bottom loop, back up to the bridge to add distance. Yeah, that added 2.5 miles... oops. He agreed to it, so I didn't entertain his complaints about me leading him astray after the run was over. The only person who is allowed to say that to me is you >:( Something interesting I learned on the bridge however, was that Thomas' friend almost jumped off once. It started because I told him it would be fun to dive off rn, and we can find gaps in the nets. I guess it sounds funnier to me or someone who knows im depressed. You would have laughed for sure. Actually, I could see you stopping and being like "Suraj, this area requires more effort to make the leap. There is a more optimal angle up ahead, and it's higher from the ground so more certainty." Ok maybe you wouldn't have made that joke, but I am depressed so it's funny. Ok back to Thomas. Apparently, when he lived in the Presidio, he had two roommates, Jose and bridge friend. Bridge friend was going through tough times, and was very visibly depressed, so one day when he disappeared, Jose called Thomas to drive to the bridge to check if he was trying to jump. Idk how Jose just knew that, but Thomas drove over, and saw the friend sitting on the ledge leering over on the biker side of the bridge. He instantly called 911, and police came and took the friend in to the hospital. After he was released, the friend went back to live with his parents and never came back to SF. Well he came back months later to pick up his things, and at that point he thanked Thomas and Jose for saving his life, and he will be eternally grateful to them. So that friend was originally a research student at UCSF, but now Thomas said he left it all behind and teaches roller blading for a living. He found a new passion and does that now. Maybe he is much happier now doing what he loves, but I guess I saw it more as a loss. He probably had a great career/life in front of him, but depression destroyed all those plans for him, and now he's just chilling in his hometown wherever it is. Could that happen to me as well? Am I actively destroying my life right now? Also, if Thomas has been there for a friend in this context before, should I trust him more with my emotions? Well I suppose he just called 911. Just some thoughts running around my head.

That night, Pooja showed up around like 5 PM. She always says that I don't do much for her, and that she wants to be treated like a princess. So, this time, I decided that I should do something more for when she shows up. It may sound like the basics, but I tried to do everything I could. First, I cleaned and refilled her water bottle, and put it on the nightstand. Then, I made sure to wash her special pillowcase like she asked me to do last week. I didn't have time to run over and get her flowers, but that was supposed to be the plan. I bought a humidifier for her, because she complained about SF being dry and affecting her skin, and set it up in my room. Got her a reusable heat pack because she always complains about her neck and back hurting. Then I messaged her saying we should go to Mensho tonight, because she has been wanting to go there for a long time, and I've always been the one vetoing the idea since I don't like it. I swear I did something else as well, but I forget. Oh, I bought a new basketball as well so we could shoot some hoops together, since she enjoyed that last time. Well, she showed up, and said that she's not hungry at all so no Mensho. There went that plan, fine. Then later when we had time for basketball, she was too lazy to play and just wanted to watch TV. Okay, fine. Then she was like where are the flowers huh. Great, I messed that up too. Then there was nitpicking about things I need to do around the house and how I kept one jacket on the floor causing a mess. Clearly, I'm a shitty boyfriend. Man can't even do the basics. It's moments like this, that I wonder if I could have ever treated you like the princess you are. "Rish is literally giving me princess treatment right now." That line just keeps replaying in my head. If Deepthi was with me, would she be upset for the same reasons as Pooja? Would she feel like I'm not doing enough for her? Would she atleast smile when she sees I refilled her water? I said I took Pooja's kindness for granted now, but in reality does she take me for granted? Like, I don't even know what she likes about me at this point. Seems like she just wants to be with me, because on paper I'm ideal for her idk. She says I understand her, but do I? Also, I wanted to play a board game with me, her, thomas, and kasey, but she was too tired to play that too.
